sentence: all parties _______ in the expediency of the law.
to _______ to an offer, or to opinion.
the picture does not _______ with the original; the two scales _______ exactly.
definition: To harmonize in opinion, statement, or action; to be in unison or concord; to be or become united or consistent; to concur.
To yield assent; to accede;—followed by to.
To yield assent to; to approve.
